headline: 痴迷领跑今日娱乐，新片周末蓄势待发
headlineEn: Obsession Leads Today's Entertainment, New Films Ready for Weekend
summary: 今日娱乐焦点：痴迷持续霸榜，末日地堡与福尔摩斯小姐3热度不减。本周无新片上映，但穿普拉达的女王2等备受期待。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment focus: Obsession continues to dominate, with Silo and Enola Holmes 3 staying hot. No new releases today, but The Devil Wears Prada 2 and others are highly anticipated.

industryHighlights.text: 本周新片零上映，市场静待周末爆发
industryHighlights.en: No new releases this week, market awaits weekend boom

industryHighlights.text: 穿普拉达的女王2跻身本周热搜前列
industryHighlights.en: The Devil Wears Prada 2 enters top weekly searches

industryHighlights.text: 超级少女与玩具总动员5热度上升
industryHighlights.en: Supergirl and Toy Story 5 gain traction

industryHighlights.text: 安昂传奇等未来大片引发期待
industryHighlights.en: Upcoming blockbusters like Avatar: The Last Airbender spark anticipation
